proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `er_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.865 for er_positive=1 versus 4.297 for er_positive=0, a signed difference of 0.568 months (Welch t-test p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.317 for her2_positive=1 versus 4.776 for her2_positive=0, a signed difference of -0.459 months (Welch t-test p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.
Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 0.
Patients with `liver_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `liver_mets` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.617 for stage_iv=1 versus 5.153 for stage_iv=0, difference -1.536 months (p=<1e-16).
Mean pfs_months was 3.75 for has_brain_mets=1 versus 4.8 for has_brain_mets=0, difference -1.05 months (p=<1e-16).
Mean pfs_months was 4.708 for liver_mets=1 versus 4.69 for liver_mets=0, difference 0.018 months (p=0.555).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for treatments and clinical severity variables, `er_positive` remains positively associated with `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for treatments and clinical severity variables, `her2_positive` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In an OLS model adjusted for treatments, stage, metastatic sites, performance status, tumor burden, inflammation, and related biomarkers, the er_positive coefficient was 0.531 months (p=<1e-16).
In the same adjusted OLS model, the her2_positive coefficient was -0.475 months (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `er_positive` equal to 1, those with `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 0.
Among patients with `er_positive` equal to 1, those with `treatment_tamoxifen` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_tamoxifen` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive=1, palbociclib-treated patients had mean pfs_months 5.89 versus 4.313 without palbociclib, difference 1.577 months (p=<1e-16).
Within er_positive=1, tamoxifen-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.881 versus 4.858 without tamoxifen, difference 0.023 months (p=0.450).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1, those with `treatment_trastuzumab` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_trastuzumab` equal to 0.
Among patients with `her2_positive` equal to 0, `treatment_trastuzumab` has little or no positive association with mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Within her2_positive=1, trastuzumab-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.254 versus 4.334 without trastuzumab, difference -0.079 months (p=0.153).
Within her2_positive=0, trastuzumab-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.735 versus 4.786 without trastuzumab, difference -0.051 months (p=0.104).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `brca1_mutation` equal to 1 or `brca2_mutation` equal to 1, those with `treatment_olaparib` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_olaparib` equal to 0.
Among patients with both `brca1_mutation` and `brca2_mutation` equal to 0, `treatment_olaparib` has little or no positive association with mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Within BRCA1/2-mutated patients, olaparib-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.933 versus 4.587 without olaparib, difference 0.346 months (p=0.0414).
Within BRCA1/2-wildtype patients, olaparib-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.646 versus 4.702 without olaparib, difference -0.056 months (p=0.143).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 0, those with `treatment_pembrolizumab` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_pembrolizumab` equal to 0.
Among patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 1, the positive association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and mean `pfs_months` is attenuated compared with patients without autoimmune disease.

analyses.result_summary: Within autoimmune_disease=0, pembrolizumab-treated patients had mean pfs_months 4.64 versus 4.705 without pembrolizumab, difference -0.065 months (p=0.0430).

In an adjusted OLS model with treatment_pembrolizumab, autoimmune_disease, their interaction, and severity covariates, the interaction coefficient was -0.009 months (p=0.907). A negative coefficient means the pembrolizumab association is smaller in autoimmune_disease=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with high inflammatory burden, defined as `crp_mg_l` above the 75th percentile or `nlr` above the 75th percentile, `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` equal to 1 is associated with higher mean `pfs_months` than no sacituzumab govitecan.
The positive association between `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` and mean `pfs_months` is larger in the high inflammatory burden subgroup than in the lower inflammatory burden subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: In the high inflammatory burden subgroup, sacituzumab govitecan was associated with mean pfs_months 4.669 versus 4.709, difference -0.04 months (p=0.491).
In an adjusted OLS model with sacituzumab govitecan, high inflammatory burden, their interaction, and severity covariates, the interaction coefficient was 0.002 months (p=0.957).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and mean `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `ki67_pct` in the highest quartile than among patients with lower `ki67_pct`.

analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted OLS model with palbociclib, high_ki67, their interaction, er_positive, and severity covariates, the interaction coefficient was -1.47 months (p=<1e-16); negative values indicate attenuation in high ki67_pct.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for disease severity and treatments, a one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for disease severity and treatments, a one-standard-deviation increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for a one-SD increase in albumin_g_dl was 0.24 months (p=<1e-16).
Adjusted OLS coefficient for a one-SD increase in ldh_u_l was -0.043 months (p=2.27e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_trastuzumab` with `pfs_months` is strongest when both `her2_positive` and `her2_amplification` equal 1, producing a positive three-way interaction among `treatment_trastuzumab`, `her2_positive`, and `her2_amplification`.

analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted model containing all lower-order trastuzumab, her2_positive, and her2_amplification terms plus severity covariates, the three-way interaction coefficient was 0.083 months (p=0.690).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_tamoxifen` with `pfs_months` is larger when `pr_positive` equals 1, even after accounting for `er_positive` and disease severity.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_tamoxifen by pr_positive, controlling for er_positive and severity covariates, was -0.019 months (p=0.469).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `bone_mets` equal to 1 than among patients with `bone_mets` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan by bone_mets was 0.011 months (p=0.829); negative values indicate smaller treatment association in bone_mets=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_olaparib` with `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `chronic_kidney_disease` equal to 1 after accounting for BRCA mutation status and severity.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_olaparib by chronic_kidney_disease, controlling for BRCA1/2 mutation status and severity covariates, was 0.082 months (p=0.183).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients not fully captured by `her2_positive`, `her2_low` modifies the association between `treatment_trastuzumab` and `pfs_months`, with a positive `treatment_trastuzumab` by `her2_low` interaction after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_trastuzumab by her2_low, controlling for her2_positive and severity covariates, was -0.021 months (p=0.488).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with `pfs_months` is smaller as `ecog_ps` increases, yielding a negative `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `ecog_ps` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab by ecog_ps was -0.047 months per ECOG point (p=0.0517).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_tamoxifen` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `postmenopausal` equal to 1 than in patients with `postmenopausal` equal to 0 after accounting for hormone receptor status and severity.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_tamoxifen by postmenopausal, controlling for er_positive, pr_positive, and severity covariates, was -0.006 months (p=0.815).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 is associated with shorter `pfs_months`, and this negative association is partly offset among patients with `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 1.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS main coefficient for pik3ca_mutation when treatment_palbociclib=0 was -0.004 months (p=0.769).

Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for pik3ca_mutation by treatment_palbociclib was -1.667 months (p=<1e-16); positive values indicate offset of the mutation-associated decrement among treated patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `stage_iv` with `pfs_months` is more severe when `liver_mets` equals 1, yielding a negative `stage_iv` by `liver_mets` interaction after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for stage_iv by liver_mets was 0.028 months (p=0.388).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `interstitial_lung_disease_history` equal to 1.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab by interstitial_lung_disease_history was 0.099 months (p=0.236).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `hemoglobin_g_dl` in the lowest quartile have lower `pfs_months`, and this negative association is not fully rescued by `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for hemoglobin_g_dl in the lowest quartile was 0.005 months (p=0.706).
Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for low hemoglobin by treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan was 0.021 months (p=0.645).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age, measured per 10-year increase in `age_years`, is associated with shorter `pfs_months`, and the association of `treatment_tamoxifen` with `pfs_months` does not materially increase with age.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for each 10-year increase in age_years when treatment_tamoxifen=0 was 1.755 months (p=<1e-16).
Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for age_years per 10 years by treatment_tamoxifen was 0.003 months (p=0.831).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `venous_thromboembolism_history` equal to 1 is associated with shorter `pfs_months`, especially among patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS main coefficient for venous_thromboembolism_history when stage_iv=0 was 0.052 months (p=0.0564).
Adjusted OLS interaction coefficient for venous_thromboembolism_history by stage_iv was -0.123 months (p=0.0121).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adding biomarker-matched treatment interactions (`treatment_palbociclib` by `er_positive`, `treatment_tamoxifen` by `er_positive`, `treatment_trastuzumab` by `her2_positive`, and `treatment_olaparib` by any BRCA1/2 mutation) improves prediction of `pfs_months` beyond main effects and severity covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Nested-model partial F-test comparing main effects plus severity covariates with a model adding four biomarker-matched treatment interactions gave F=1173.967 (p=<1e-16). The positive effect_estimate is the F statistic for added interaction signal.
